description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slender build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally. She has long, straight hair that falls past her shoulders and is styled with a side part. The figure is dressed in a strapless, form-fitting bodysuit with a corset-like midsection and high-waisted leggings, both featuring a sleek, shiny finish. The outfit is completed with high-heeled boots that reach just below the knees. Her facial features are defined, and she appears to be wearing subtle makeup. The overall appearance suggests a fashionable, urban pedestrian, possibly modeled for a modern city environment.
description: A stylized adult woman in a strapless, form-fitting bodysuit with high-heeled boots and long, straight hair, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has a sleek, fashionable urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the strapless bodysuit, corset detail, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the contour of the bodysuit and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hair, the corset-like midsection, and the fit of the leggings and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and the smooth lines of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: strapless bodysuit with corset-style midsection and high-waisted leggings, paired with high-heeled boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with a side part
